{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heaven's Drop
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Heaven's Drops are powerful constructs that appear as dull, gray-green objects. To be effective, they must be combined with a soul-strengthening elixir before consumption. The potency of the resulting effect depends on the quality of the catalyst used; while they can provide minor benefits, they are also capable of inducing permanent transformations that fundamentally alter an individual's soul. When activated with liquids such as [[Spirit Well water]], these constructs can glow intensely and emit energy like lightning. Once integrated into a person's spirit, they can nourish channels and cores, fill them with power, and drive an individual toward the limits of their current stage. They can also be used to increase the power of specific entities or models to dangerous levels.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Heaven's Drop]] is a [[construct]] that can be used with [[Spirit Well water]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The fourth [[Heaven's Drop]] was still present.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] rejected the [[Heaven's Drop]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Heaven's Drop]] increases the power of the [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has materials for another Heaven’s Drop.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Heaven's Drop]] helped [[Yerin]] advance to the limit of [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
